properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can't wait for eternity Join the song They're already singing Holy, holy, holy Are You Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just to bow down Before Your throne See Your face, I'll cry out Because You're Holy, holy, holy Are You Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, king of kings Jesus, majesty Jesus, king of kings Jesus, majesty

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Standing with those Who have heard well done Proclaiming forever That You're the one who's Faithful, faithful, faithful Are You Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What can we give You But endless praise The heavens roar as we shout Your name is Jesus, Jesus, Jesus You are Lord!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: Worthy, worthy, worthy Lord, another glimpse of glory We sing once more Worthy, worthy, worthy Lord, forever, forever :/

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Worthy, worthy, worthy, Lord Worthy, worthy, worthy, Lord Worthy is the lamb Worthy is the lamb You are holy, holy Are you Lord God almighty Worthy is the lamb Worthy is the lamb

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You are holy, holy Are you Lord God almighty Worthy is the lamb Worthy is the lamb Holy is the lamb Holy is the lamb Righteous is the lamb Righteous is the lamb Jesus is the lamb Jesus is the lamb, amen
